description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to an outfit. This crinkled genuine leather belt from the puma collection is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length at largest setting: 110 cmMade of leather for durability and stylePrinted looped clasp in metal with ferrari badge embossed on it to hold the belt in place in style and to adjust FitCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
